$roomCode..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('players').child(auth.uid).exists()) || (data.exists() && !newData.exists() && data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid))

settings..validate: newData.hasChildren(['mode','cardsPerPlayer','floorMultipliers','handVisibility','bluffEnabled','maxPlayers']) && (newData.child('handVisibility').val() === 'private' || newData.child('handVisibility').val() === 'public') && newData.child('cardsPerPlayer').isNumber() && newData.child('cardsPerPlayer').val() >= 3 && newData.child('cardsPerPlayer').val() <= 6 && newData.child('maxPlayers').isNumber() && newData.child('maxPlayers').val() >= 2 && newData.child('maxPlayers').val() <= 12 && !(newData.child('handVisibility').val() === 'public' && newData.child('bluffEnabled').val() === true)

$uid..write: auth != null && (root.child('rooms').child($roomCode).child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid || (auth.uid === $uid && ((!data.exists() && root.child('rooms').child($roomCode).child('status').val() === 'lobby') || !newData.exists() || (data.exists() && newData.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() === data.child('uid').val() && newData.child('name').val() === data.child('name').val() && newData.child('role').val() === data.child('role').val() && newData.child('joinedAt').val() === data.child('joinedAt').val() && newData.child('skulls').val() === data.child('skulls').val() && newData.child('crowns').val() === data.child('crowns').val() && newData.child('availableCards').val() === data.child('availableCards').val() && newData.child('usedCards').val() === data.child('usedCards').val() && newData.child('claimsMade').val() === data.child('claimsMade').val() && newData.child('successfulBluffs').val() === data.child('successfulBluffs').val() && newData.child('failedBluffs').val() === data.child('failedBluffs').val() && newData.child('correctChallenges').val() === data.child('correctChallenges').val() && newData.child('incorrectChallenges').val() === data.child('incorrectChallenges').val()))) || (auth.uid === $uid && root.child('rooms').child($roomCode).child('activeClaim').child('claimantUid').val() === auth.uid) || (root.child('rooms').child($roomCode).child('players').child(auth.uid).exists() && root.child('rooms').child($roomCode).child('activeClaim').child('targetUid').val() === auth.uid))
$uid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['uid','name','role','joinedAt','connected','lastSeen','skulls','crowns','availableCards','usedCards']) && newData.child('uid').val() === $uid && (!data.exists() || (newData.child('uid').val() === data.child('uid').val() && newData.child('name').val() === data.child('name').val() && newData.child('role').val() === data.child('role').val() && newData.child('joinedAt').val() === data.child('joinedAt').val())))

activeClaim..write: auth != null && root.child('rooms').child($roomCode).child('players').child(auth.uid).exists() && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('claimantUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && (data.child('claimantUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('targetUid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('rooms').child($roomCode).child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid)))

$claimId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('claimantUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && (data.child('claimantUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('targetUid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('rooms').child($roomCode).child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid)))
